findings.edge: Mean reversion in high-volatility stocks near low, ranked by research-weighted conviction
research_findings: Within AND-gate universe, 9/21 features are significant predictors (Cohen's d up to 0.19)
gap_frequency, avg_true_range_pct, avg_up_day are strongest positive predictors
price_vs_ma10, ma_slope_5, price_vs_high are strongest negative predictors
Weighted ranking produces 70.5% rank-1 WR but collapses rank-2+ WR to 45.5%
Rank-1 only + loose entry (ENTRY_DRAWDOWN=-0.05) + weighted ranking reaches PF 1.64
findings.limitation: Bear regime (PF 0.96) loses money; consider regime-based skip for Bear
next_steps: Add Bear regime override to skip trading when ret_20d < -3%
Monitor live performance vs backtest expectations
changes: ENTRY_DRAWDOWN: -0.08 → -0.05 (looser entry brings more candidates for ranking)
